title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie International Enterprises:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
